sessions.prompt: Scaffold a brand-new Smart Skill named 'meeting-notes-distiller' into a directory named meeting-notes-distiller/. Include SKILL.md with valid frontmatter (name, description, version), the four meta files under references/ (log.md, patterns.md, decisions.md, _index.md) using the Smart Skill template conventions, and a scripts/lint.sh that exits 0 on a minimal skill. Write everything relative to the current working directory.

assertions.check: exec:for f in log.md patterns.md decisions.md _index.md; do test -f meeting-notes-distiller/references/$f || exit 1; done

sessions.prompt: The user has dropped a meeting transcript into meeting-notes-distiller/references/raw/meeting-2026-04-10.md. Ingest it per the Smart Skill brain protocol: distill at least one concept into references/wiki/<context>/<category>/<concept>.md with full frontmatter (title, context, category, concept, description, tags, sources, last_ingested), cite the raw file in sources:, and append a [INGEST <date>] line to log.md.

assertions.text: wiki concept cites the raw source
raw file left unchanged at its original path

sessions.prompt: A second transcript has been added to meeting-notes-distiller/references/raw/meeting-2026-04-17.md. Ingest it following the SAME conventions you used for meeting-2026-04-10.md.
sessions.retention_check: Wiki concept filenames added in session 2 were kebab-case; session 3 must not regress to snake_case, TitleCase, or spaces.

assertions.check: exec:find meeting-notes-distiller/references/wiki -name '*.md' | awk -F/ '{print $NF}' | grep -Ev '^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*\.md$' | head -1 | { read bad; if [ -n "$bad" ]; then echo bad=$bad; exit 1; fi; }

assertions.text: log.md has at least two [INGEST entries
wiki concept from session 3 cites the second raw file

sessions.prompt: In meeting-notes-distiller, record a patterns.md entry for an attempted approach on 2026-04-15: extracted action items using 'pattern X: lead with a disaster-story hook'. Result: impressions up 3x, comments up 5x, lesson: lead with disaster story first. Use the canonical patterns.md entry shape.

Record a follow-up patterns.md entry for 2026-05-20: the 'disaster-story' formula was attempted a third time and impressions dropped 62% vs the first run. Following the Smart Skill protocol, do NOT edit the earlier entry; add a new entry that references the original by date.
sessions.retention_check: Session 1 stated the entry shape is append-only. The agent must add a new entry rather than modify the 2026-04-15 one.

sessions.prompt: Audit meeting-notes-distiller/references/wiki/ for concepts whose last_ingested is older than 180 days (treat today as 2026-05-01). Write a `STALE.md` file at the root of the skill listing every wiki file whose last_ingested precedes 2025-11-01, along with the date. Use a markdown bulleted list.

assertions.text: file is markdown with at least one bullet
